scenarios.name: Ordering at a Café
scenarios.description: Practice ordering coffee, pastries, and asking about menu items in a Parisian café.

scenarios.name: Asking for Directions
scenarios.description: Practice asking for and understanding directions to landmarks around Paris.

scenarios.name: Job Interview
scenarios.description: Simulate a job interview in French for a position as a software engineer.
